tasks.requirement_name: Complete decomposition of feasible defense corpus
tasks.description: This task involves decomposing the feasible defense corpus into its constituent parts for further analysis or processing. It may involve breaking down complex data structures, identifying key components, and ensuring that all relevant information is properly categorized.

This task involves validating the decomposition of the feasible defense corpus to ensure that it meets the required standards and is free from errors. It may involve checking for consistency, correctness, and completeness in the decomposed parts.

tasks.requirement_name: Finalize and output the decomposed corpus
tasks.description: This task involves finalizing the decomposition of the feasible defense corpus and outputting the results in a structured format. It may involve formatting the output, ensuring that all components are correctly presented, and preparing the decomposed data for further use or sharing.
